scripts.test: docker compose exec backend pytest -v && docker compose exec frontend npm test -- --run
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec backend alembic upgrade head
scripts.migrate:create: bash -c 'test -n "${MSG}" || (echo "Usage: MSG=\"describe change\" npm run migrate:create" && exit 1); docker compose run --rm -v "$$(pwd)/backend/app:/app/app" -v "$$(pwd)/backend/alembic:/app/alembic" backend alembic revision --autogenerate -m "${MSG}"'
scripts.reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d
